---
label: "Eval & Deploy"
icon: "\uD83D\uDE80"
---

## Evaluation & Deployment
  <CodeBlock b64="" />
  <ExpandableSection title="Deployment Checklist" icon="✅">

- A/B test fine-tuned vs base model on 10% of traffic
- Monitor for regression on general capabilities
- Set up rollback mechanism (swap back to base model)
- Track domain-specific metrics (style score, accuracy)
- Re-evaluate monthly as base models improve

</ExpandableSection>
